commands.title: Check for exposed .git directory manually
commands.note: If accessible, the .git directory may be downloaded and analyzed.

commands.title: Download exposed .git directory using GitTools
commands.note: Downloads the full Git repository into a local folder.

commands.title: Using git-dumper
commands.note: Another automated tool to download and reconstruct the Git repository.

commands.title: Using GitHack
commands.template:
git clone https://github.com/lijiejie/GitHack.git
cd GitHack
python3 githack.py http://{domain}/.git/
commands.note: Automated Git directory enumeration and extraction.

commands.title: Retrieve Git HEAD file
commands.note: Useful to identify current Git branch.

commands.title: Retrieve objects/info/packs
commands.note: Helps in listing available pack files for extraction.

commands.title: List commit history
commands.note: View commit messages and history for sensitive info (e.g., passwords, keys).

commands.title: Check .gitignore for hidden files
commands.note: May reveal files that developers intended to hide.
